## Goal
Analyze the rental transaction data provided by the user.

## Progress
- Located the correct data file: `省心租交易数据_全国_202503197319642467751310656.csv`
- Completed full data analysis including:
  - Basic data overview (25,053 rows, 8 columns)
  - City distribution analysis (13 cities)
  - Product/channel analysis (14 payment methods)
  - Amount range distribution (7 tiers)
  - Time trend analysis (weekly and daily)
  - Weekday vs weekend comparison

## Decisions
- Used Python with pandas for data processing
- Generated comprehensive analysis report saved to `reports/省心租交易数据分析报告.md`

## Findings
- **Total transactions**: 1.06M transactions, 45.7B CNY over 69 days
- **Top cities**: Beijing (41.1%), Shanghai (17.7%), Chengdu (10.5%)
- **Top channels**: Alipay APP (45.6%) + WeChat Mini Program (36.7%) = 82.3% of amount
- **Amount tiers**: 1000-5000 CNY (65% volume, 40% amount) vs 5000+ CNY (21% volume, 60% amount)
- **Seasonality**: Chinese New Year (Week 4-5) caused 37% drop
- **Beijing premium**: Average transaction 8,381 CNY (2x other cities)

## Open Questions
- N/A - initial analysis complete

## Errors
- Initial path `省心租交易数据_全国_2` was a directory that doesn't exist; actual file is in parent directory

## Next Steps
- Report saved to: `/Users/shawn/Data/Kyberkit/spaces/default/reports/省心租交易数据分析报告.md`
- Ready for follow-up questions or deeper analysis (e.g., predictive modeling, city-specific drill-down)
